articles.title: BNY builds “AI for everyone, everywhere” with OpenAI
articles.summary: BNY Mellon has partnered with OpenAI to develop an "AI for everyone, everywhere" platform, aiming to make artificial intelligence more accessible and integrated into daily life. This collaboration is expected to drive innovation and increase the adoption of AI across various industries. By democratizing AI, BNY Mellon and OpenAI seek to unlock new opportunities and transform the way businesses operate.

articles.title: How We Used Codex to Ship Sora for Android in 28 Days
articles.summary: The development team behind Sora utilized Codex, a cutting-edge AI-powered coding tool, to successfully launch the Android version of their app in just 28 days. Codex's automated coding capabilities significantly accelerated the development process, allowing the team to meet their tight deadline. By leveraging Codex, the team demonstrated the potential for AI-driven tools to revolutionize the speed and efficiency of mobile app development.

articles.title: BBVA and OpenAI collaborate to transform global banking
articles.summary: BBVA has partnered with OpenAI to revolutionize global banking by integrating AI technology into its operations, aiming to enhance customer experience and improve internal processes. This collaboration is expected to drive innovation in the financial sector, enabling BBVA to stay ahead of the curve. By leveraging OpenAI's cutting-edge technology, BBVA seeks to create more personalized and efficient banking services for its customers worldwide.

articles.title: Advancing science and math with GPT-5.2
articles.summary: Researchers have unveiled GPT-5.2, a cutting-edge AI model that promises to revolutionize science and math education by providing personalized learning experiences and automating complex problem-solving tasks. This innovative technology has the potential to make STEM subjects more accessible and engaging for students of all skill levels. With GPT-5.2, students can expect more accurate and efficient solutions to complex math and science problems, enhancing their overall learning outcomes.

articles.title: The Walt Disney Company and OpenAI reach landmark agreement to bring beloved characters to Sora
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Company has partnered with OpenAI to integrate its iconic characters into Sora, a cutting-edge platform. This landmark agreement will enable the creation of immersive experiences featuring Disney's beloved characters, leveraging OpenAI's innovative technologies. The collaboration is set to revolutionize the entertainment industry, bringing new interactive possibilities to fans worldwide.

articles.title: Improved Gemini audio models for powerful voice experiences
articles.summary: Google has upgraded its Gemini audio models, enabling more accurate and efficient voice experiences. The improved models can better understand and respond to user voice commands, paving the way for more powerful and intuitive voice assistants. This advancement is expected to enhance the overall user experience in various voice-enabled applications and devices.

articles.title: Deepening our partnership with the UK AI Security Institute
articles.summary: A leading tech company has strengthened its partnership with the UK AI Security Institute to enhance AI security and innovation. This collaboration aims to develop cutting-edge AI solutions and address emerging security threats. By working together, they seek to foster a safer and more secure AI ecosystem.

articles.title: Strengthening our partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the AI era
articles.summary: A major tech company has announced a strengthened partnership with the UK government, aiming to harness AI for economic growth and national security. This collaboration will focus on developing AI solutions to drive innovation and prosperity, while also addressing potential risks and challenges. By working together, the UK government and the tech company seek to establish the country as a leader in responsible AI development and deployment.

articles.title: FACTS Benchmark Suite: Systematically evaluating the factuality of large language models
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced the FACTS Benchmark Suite, a comprehensive evaluation tool to assess the factuality of large language models, helping to identify and improve their accuracy and reliability. This suite systematically tests models' ability to distinguish fact from fiction, a crucial aspect of their performance. By using FACTS, developers can refine their models to provide more trustworthy and informative responses.

articles.title: Engineering more resilient crops for a warming climate
articles.summary: Scientists are developing more resilient crops to combat the challenges of a warming climate, using advanced engineering techniques to enhance their ability to withstand extreme temperatures and weather conditions. This innovation aims to improve crop yields and food security in the face of rising global temperatures. By creating climate-resilient crops, researchers hope to mitigate the impacts of climate change on agriculture and ensure a sustainable food supply.

articles.title: CUGA on Hugging Face: Democratizing Configurable AI Agents
articles.summary: Hugging Face has introduced CUGA, a platform that enables the creation of customizable AI agents, making it easier for developers to build and deploy tailored AI models. This innovation democratizes access to configurable AI, allowing users to create agents that fit their specific needs without requiring extensive expertise. By lowering the barrier to entry, CUGA has the potential to accelerate AI adoption across various industries and applications.

articles.title: Nemotron 3 Nano \- A new Standard for Efficient, Open, and Intelligent Agentic Models
articles.summary: The Nemotron 3 Nano introduces a new standard for efficient, open, and intelligent agentic models, revolutionizing the field of artificial intelligence. This innovative model enables more accurate and autonomous decision-making, paving the way for breakthroughs in various industries. By providing an open and accessible framework, Nemotron 3 Nano has the potential to accelerate AI research and development, driving significant advancements in the years to come.

articles.title: New in llama.cpp: Model Management
articles.summary: The latest update to llama.cpp introduces model management capabilities, allowing users to easily manage and switch between different AI models. This innovation enhances the overall functionality and flexibility of the llama.cpp framework, making it more efficient for developers to work with various models. By streamlining model management, this update has the potential to accelerate AI development and deployment.

articles.title: Codex is Open Sourcing AI models
articles.summary: Codex, a leader in AI development, is open-sourcing its AI models, making it easier for developers to access and build upon cutting-edge technology. This move is expected to accelerate innovation and collaboration in the field of artificial intelligence. By sharing its models, Codex aims to drive advancements in areas like natural language processing and machine learning.

articles.title: Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker: Cost-efficient Frontier Multimodal Performance
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker, a cost-efficient AI model that achieves frontier multimodal performance, enabling efficient processing of various data types. This innovation has the potential to significantly reduce computational costs and improve accessibility of multimodal AI applications. By optimizing performance and reducing costs, Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker can accelerate the development of AI-powered solutions across industries.

articles.title: It seems that OpenAI is scraping [certificate transparency] logs
articles.summary: OpenAI has been found to be scraping Certificate Transparency (CT) logs, a public record of SSL/TLS certificates issued by certificate authorities. This move has raised concerns among security experts, as CT logs are typically used to monitor and detect malicious activity, not to gather data for AI model training. The scraping activity may indicate OpenAI's efforts to improve its AI models' ability to detect and respond to security threats.

articles.title: If AI replaces workers, should it also pay taxes?
articles.summary: As AI increasingly replaces human workers, a growing debate suggests that AI systems should be subject to taxation, similar to human employees, to compensate for lost tax revenue and social benefits. This concept, known as a "robot tax," aims to mitigate the economic impact of automation on society. By taxing AI, governments could potentially use the revenue to support workers displaced by technological advancements.

articles.title: AI agents are starting to eat SaaS
articles.summary: The rise of AI agents is transforming the Software as a Service (SaaS) landscape, with AI-powered tools beginning to replace traditional SaaS offerings. This shift is driven by AI's ability to automate tasks and provide personalized experiences, making SaaS models less relevant. As a result, companies are reevaluating their SaaS strategies to incorporate AI-driven solutions that can enhance efficiency and customer engagement.
